description: Forwarded messages display a [Forwarded] badge in chat pages
steps: Produce a Message with is_forwarded=true and forward_score=Some(5)
Assert the chat page contains 'Forwarded' text for that message

description: High forward_score (>=5) triggers a ViralContent forensic warning in ExtractionResult
steps: Extract from a msgstore.db where a message has forward_score >= 5
Assert ExtractionResult.forensic_warnings contains SelectiveDeletion or a new HighForwardScore variant
OR: assert the rendered chat page shows forward_score in a distinct style vs low-score forwards
